params.SpellDescription: Each opponent exiles a creature with the greatest power among creatures that player controls. Spell mastery — If there are two or more instant and/or sorcery cards in your graveyard, CARDNAME deals damage to each opponent equal to the power of the creature they exiled.

remaining_params.SpellDescription: Each opponent exiles a creature with the greatest power among creatures that player controls. Spell mastery — If there are two or more instant and/or sorcery cards in your graveyard, CARDNAME deals damage to each opponent equal to the power of the creature they exiled.
